lesson.title: Emotion & Impersonal Expressions
lesson.instructions: me alegra que, es importante que

exercises.prompt: I’m happy that you are here.
It bothers me that they do not listen.
exercises.answer: Me molesta que ellos no escuchen.

exercises.prompt: It’s important that we practice every day.
exercises.answer: Es importante que practiquemos todos los días.

exercises.prompt: Es triste que ella no pueda venir.
exercises.answer: It’s sad that she can’t come.

exercises.prompt: Me sorprende que tú no entiendas.
exercises.answer: It surprises me that you do not understand.

exercises.prompt: It bothers me that he is late.
exercises.answer: Me molesta que él llegue tarde.

exercises.prompt: It is better that we decide now.
exercises.answer: Es mejor que nosotros decidamos ahora.

exercises.prompt: I’m afraid that they are lost.

exercises.answer: I love that you study Spanish.

exercises.prompt: Es posible que él no tenga razón.
exercises.answer: It is possible that he is not right.
